limitations: No quantified AI-attributable dollar amounts, headcount, or R&D spend found in excerpts; investment intensity capped at 3.

Risk disclosure describes specific mechanisms (competitive disintermediation, revenue/margin impact, cybersecurity threat amplification) but no quantified risk exposure or named governance bodies, capping at 4.
